title: rapuntium subtile
intro: Rapuntium subtile, also known as the meadow rue or lesser meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Rapuntium subtile can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
